name: Ductus arteriosus flow share
tier_rationale: Tier C pending re-review. Source citation: rudolph-1985-fetal-circulation. Population: Late-gestation fetal lamb (extrapolated to human fetus).

applicability.population: Late-gestation fetal lamb (extrapolated to human fetus)

notes: Fraction of right-ventricular output that bypasses the lungs via the ductus arteriosus to the descending aorta.

name: Foramen ovale streamline preference
tier_rationale: Tier C pending re-review. Source citation: rudolph-1985-fetal-circulation. Population: Late-gestation fetal lamb (extrapolated to human fetus). Caveats: Direct human in-vivo measurements are limited; Rudolph's lamb data is the standard reference.

applicability.population: Late-gestation fetal lamb (extrapolated to human fetus)

notes: Weight on the umbilical-vein pole in the cerebral weighted-average mix. 0.5 corresponds to no preferential streaming; Rudolph reports ~75-80% of the most-oxygenated DV/IVC stream crossing the foramen ovale to the left atrium. Caveats: Direct human in-vivo measurements are limited; Rudolph's lamb data is the standard reference.

name: Systemic venous return PO2
tier_rationale: Tier C pending re-review. Source citation: kiserud-2000-fetal-circulation. Population: Healthy late-gestation human fetus. Caveats: Estimated from ductus venosus Doppler studies; tier C reflects indirect measurement.
notes: Effective PO2 of systemic venous return mixing into the right atrium of the fetal heart. Caveats: Estimated from ductus venosus Doppler studies; tier C reflects indirect measurement.
